description_for_human: Sovereign GPU fleet monitor for local AI inference. Monitor WES scores, thermal state, inference efficiency, and hardware health across your Ollama and vLLM nodes.
description_for_model: Wicklee monitors local AI inference fleets. Use it to check GPU health, WES (Wicklee Efficiency Score = tok/s / watts / thermal_penalty), inference state (live/idle-spd/busy/idle), thermal status, power draw, TTFT, and queue depth across Ollama and vLLM nodes. The API returns real-time telemetry and routing recommendations. Auth via X-API-Key header.
